zh.lifeSummary: 當Oda de Verdun於0988年10月23日出生在法國阿爾登斯時，她的父親Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie22歲，母親Urraca d'Ivrea24歲。她於1020年與Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利費艾坎普結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1044年10月23日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉盧瓦享年56歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oda de Verdun于0988年10月23日出生在法国阿爾登斯时，她的父亲Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie22岁，母亲Urraca d'Ivrea24岁。她于1020年与Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利費艾坎普结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1044年10月23日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉盧瓦享年56岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Oda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a short form of any of the given names ending in these letters, for example,   Fiona   and   Anona  , now well established as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Oda de Verdun was born on 23 October 0988, in Ardennes, France, her father, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, was 22 and her mother, Urraca d'Ivrea, was 24. She married Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel in 1020, in Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 October 1044, in Louvain, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Nivelles, Walloon Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oda de Verdun est née le 23 octobre 0988, à Ardennes, France, son père, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Urraca d'Ivrea, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel en 1020, à Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1044, à Louvain, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Oda de Verdun am 23. Oktober 0988 in Ardennes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie 22 und ihre Mutter Urraca d'Ivrea 24. Sie hat 1020 in Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Oktober 1044 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Louvain, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Nivelles, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oda de Verdun è nata il il 23 ottobre 0988 nel Ardennes, Francia, sua padre, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Urraca d'Ivrea, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel nel 1020, nel Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 ottobre 1044, nel Louvain, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Oda de Verdunが0988年10月23日にフランスアルデンスで生まれた時，父Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingieは22歳，母Urraca d'Ivreaは24歳であった。1020年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフeカンップでLambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brusselと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1044年10月23日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインロウベインで56歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバント ワロンニベレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Oda de Verdun(이)가 0988년 10월 23일 프랑스 아데네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Urraca d'Ivrea(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1020년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 프e캠프에서 Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1044년 10월 23일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 루바인에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 월런 니벨레스에 묻혔다.

mn.23. Oktober 0988–23 October 1044: 0988 оны Аравдугаар сарын 23–1044 оны Аравдугаар сарын 23

pt.23. Oktober 0988–23 October 1044: 23 de outubro de 0988–23 de outubro de 1044
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oda de Verdun nasceu em 23 de outubro de 0988, em Ardennes, França, seu pai, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Urraca d'Ivrea, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel em 1020, em Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1044, em Louvain, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oda de Verdun родилась 23 октября 0988 г. в местности арденнесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Urraca d'Ivrea, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel в 1020 г. в местности фeкамп, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 октября 1044 г. в местности лоувеин, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности нивеллесь, брабант валлон, Бельгия.

es.23. Oktober 0988–23 October 1044: 23 de octubre de 0988–23 de octubre de 1044
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Oda de Verdun nació el 23 de octubre de 0988, en Ardennes, Francia, su papá, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Urraca d'Ivrea, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel en 1020, en Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1044, en Louvain, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.
